## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (Node built-ins only), or justified below
- [ ] Relative imports use `.js`; type-only imports use `import type`
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated (package `README.md`, and `CHANGELOG.md` if behaviour changed)
